meta.title: The Space Force's New Uniforms & Other Top Stories From Sandboxx News
meta.description:
Subscribe and 🔔 to Sandboxx YouTube so you never miss a video. 

It's Saturday, July 17, 2020.  Stay up to date on what's happening in the military with Sandboxx News. 

Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

WHY IS THE SPACE FORCE’S NEW UNIFORM CAMOUFLAGE?
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/2OAWxaV

WHY DOES AMERICA NEED A DELTA FORCE?
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/2DWfR0g

3 REASONS WASHINGTON’S FOOTBALL TEAM SHOULD BE CALLED THE REDTAILS
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/2CPAlXL

CHINA’S J-20 STEALTH FIGHTER IS GAINING ON AMERICA’S TOP JETS
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/32wgAj5

‘THE TEAM HOUSE’ REVEALS THE REAL PEOPLE BEHIND AMERICA’S COVERT OPS
Get the full story 👉 https://sbxx.us/2OEa8hO

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.
